text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The popularity results for the Arima<n>Kinen are in...
and I have come out on<n>top! I waste no time calling
a press<n>conference to make my future<n>intentions
known.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The room is wall to wall with people!<n>They will
surely be blessed for<n>seeking out this incarnation
of beauty<n>that is I!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I treat the citizenry to an eight-hour<n>opera to
express my sheer joy!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: But... I have not forgotten the one whowas with me stride for stride, guidingme to the throne. Yes, I have notforgotten you.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I dedicate myself to you. Now, with<n>this victory at
the Arima Kinen, and<n>from its throne, I bestow
upon you the<n>title of Greatest Trainer!
